10: current←nodeinopenSetwithlowestfScore
11: ifcurrent=goalthen
12: returnReconstructPath(cameFrom,current)
13: endif
14: openSet←openSet\{current}
15: foreachneighborneighborofcurrentdo
16: tentative_gScore←gScore[current]+dist(current,neighbor)
17: iftentative_gScore<gScore[neighbor]then
18: cameFrom[neighbor]←current
19: gScore[neighbor]←tentative_gScore
20: fScore[neighbor]←gScore[neighbor]+h(neighbor)
21: ifneighbor∈/ openSetthen
22: openSet←openSet∪{neighbor}
23: endif
24: endif
25: endfor
26: endwhile
27: returnfailure
